channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: Delhi hotel fire: Another Bangladeshi succumbs to burn injuries
item.description: A Bangladeshi woman has succumbed to the burn injuries she suffered during in a devastating fire at a hotel in the Indian capital on Jun 3, bringing the death toll to 23. The woman died at a local hospital on Wednesday, reports NDTV, citing police. However, a statement by Deputy Commissioner of P Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Blast in China's Guangxi kills seven, injures 17
item.description: An explosion killed seven people early on Thursday in China's southwestern region of Guangxi, local authorities said in a notice, adding that they were investigating its cause, but ruling out a risk from gas pipelines, reports Reuters. Seventeen injured were taken to the hospital, but none were in Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Blast in China's Guangxi kills seven, injures 17
item.description: An explosion killed seven people early on Thursday in China's southwestern region of Guangxi, local authorities said in a notice, adding that they were investigating its cause, but ruling out a risk from gas pipelines. Seventeen injured were taken to hospital, but none in critical condition, they Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Indian home minister Amit Shah launches Land Port Management System
item.description: Indian Home Minister Amit Shah has launched the Land Port Management System (LPMS), a centralised digital platform to modernise operations across the country’s land ports by integrating cargo, passenger and vehicle processing on a single interface, reports bdnews24.com, citing Hindustan Times Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Pakistani airstrikes kill at least 13 in Afghanistan, Taliban says
item.description: At least 13 people were killed, including 11 children, after Pakistan's military launched air strikes in three Afghan provinces, Afghan Taliban spokesperson Zabihullah Mujahid said on Wednesday, in a renewal of a conflict that has killed hundreds this year. At least 14 others - all of them childre Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Indian PM Modi to visit France, Slovakia from June 13-18
item.description: Indian ‌Prime ​Minister ​Narendra Modi ⁠will ​visit France ​and Slovakia ​from ​June 13 to ‌18, ⁠the Indian ​foreign ​ministry ⁠said ​on ​Tuesday. Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Thai jobs for Myanmar refugees could show way forward for Asian nations, UN says
item.description: More than 5,500 Myanmar refugees living in camps along Thailand's border have found jobs since Bangkok eased employment curbs last year, an approach that offers a regional example, a senior UN refugee official told Reuters. The step came in response to a sharp decline in global humanitarian fundin Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: 4,800 sent to Bangladesh, 836 await deportation: Suvendu
item.description: Amid continued border standoffs, the West Bengal government claims to have deported nearly 4,800 “illegal immigrants” to Bangladesh, and is holding another 836 in custody pending repatriation. The Indian state’s Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari told a meeting of his Bharatiya Jana Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Delhi hotel owner helped Bangladeshis get fake Indian IDs
item.description: Lavkesh Bajaj, the proprietor of New Delhi’s Flourish Stay bed-and-breakfast, where a devastating fire claimed 21 lives, reportedly has a history of legal troubles. The 60-year-old was previously arrested by Delhi Police in 2025 for allegedly helping Bangladeshi nationals obtain forged India Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Complaint lodged against Mamata Banerjee over Bangladesh killing remarks
item.description: A complaint has been filed against former West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee, alleging that her recent public remarks critical of constitutional institutions and “linking the Union government to a political killing in Bangladesh” were “prejudicial to the nation’s sov Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: India sees 'perfect complimentarity' with Venezuela in energy trade amid Gulf crisis
item.description: India and ​Venezuela sought to boost their ties in the energy sector on Thursday with New Delhi ‌saying that Caracas sees it as a preferred partner in the sector at a time global oil supplies have been disrupted by the Middle East crisis. Venezuela's interim President Delcy Rodriguez is visit Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Malaysia bars under-16s from signing up for social media
item.description: Malaysia has begun barring those aged under 16 from registering accounts on social media platforms, its communications regulator said on Monday, as it boosts efforts to protect minors from exposure to harmful content online. The Southeast Asian nation joins a growing number of countries introducin Delivered by PolitePaul service
